response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo has extensive experience in software development, including C++ (used at National Instruments) and other languages, but her recent roles focus heavily on Node.js, TypeScript, and JavaScript, with limited exposure to modern C++ development, cloud platforms (e.g., Azure), or industrial automation protocols. Her strengths lie in full-stack development and system design, but she lacks direct experience with secure development lifecycle (SDL) or IEC 62443 standards. The mismatch in core competencies and depth in C++/industrial cybersecurity reduces her fit for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience with Node.js, TypeScript, and JavaScript
Proven track record in building scalable, real-time systems and event-driven architectures
Hands-on experience with C++ (National Instruments) and multi-threaded/concurrent programming
concerns: Limited recent experience with C++ (primarily past roles; current stack is JavaScript/TypeScript)
No demonstrated exposure to cloud platforms (e.g., Microsoft Azure) or industrial automation protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, etc.)
Lacks direct experience with Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) or IEC 62443 standards

key_factors.factor: Cloud platform (Azure) and industrial protocols experience
Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) and IEC 62443 compliance
